case_title: PALMER, SHIRLEY vs. PUBLIC INTEREST RESEARCH GROUP (A CAL CORP)

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF PALMER, SHIRLEY AS TO DEFENDANT PUBLIC INTEREST RESEARCH GROUP (A CAL CORP)
